iron_flask.png.feedback: The image successfully passes the anti-text and composition checks, presenting a full canvas illustration without any text or borders. While the object itself conveys a sense of power and mystery fitting the lore, it inherently lacks a face. This prevents the 'expression & lore' criterion from being fully passed, leading to an 'Acceptable' verdict rather than 'Correct'.
